mandatory_tests: ## Mandatory Test Suite: QA Console Regression Flow
### Scenario: Landing page opens the operations console
- Assert page contains "Simulate a real QA control room."
### Scenario: Sign in and open the task board
- Assert page contains "Audit checkout release gate"
### Scenario: Create a task and review reports
- Fill "Task title" with "Investigate staging checkout regression"
- Fill "Task description" with "Capture the checkout flow and confirm the redirect after payment."
